_note: Old Babylonian First Dynasty as REAL father-son descent, loads before 10d (which continues Sin-muballit->Hammurabi). Reconciles the sweep skip + the intermediate kings from 12a.

a.label:
👑 Sumu-abum
c.1894 BC · founder of the First (Amorite) Dynasty of Babylon · historical

children.label:
👑 Sumu-la-El
c.1880 BC · second king of Babylon's First Dynasty; often taken as its true founder (succession from Sumu-abum, kinship uncertain) · historical

👑 Sabium
c.1844 BC · third king of Babylon; son of Sumu-la-El · historical

👑 Apil-Sin
c.1830 BC · fourth king of Babylon; son of Sabium & father of Sin-muballit · historical

👑 Sin-muballit
c.1812 BC · fifth king of the dynasty; father of Hammurabi · historical
